title: Linus AI Public
summary: Public-facing distribution, licensing, and release collateral for the Linus AI platform.

statusCards.label: Standardized GUI
statusCards.detail: Every project receives a consistent web workspace and Tauri 2 desktop shell in gui/.

statusCards.label: Detected Web Surface
statusCards.detail: No standalone HTML entrypoint was detected in the project root.

statusCards.label: Detected Tauri Runtime
statusCards.detail: The standardized shell adds a desktop runtime in gui/src-tauri.

statusCards.label: Implementation Stack
statusCards.detail: No package scripts detected at the project root.

runbook.title: Open the standardized web shell
runbook.description: Use a lightweight static file server when you want a browser-friendly operator surface.

runbook.title: Validate the Tauri desktop shell
runbook.description: Compile the standardized Tauri 2 wrapper without changing the original project runtime.

notes: The gui/ shell is additive. It does not replace or rewrite the original product implementation.
Existing browser, desktop, backend, and documentation surfaces are mapped into this shell for operator visibility.
The Tauri desktop shell uses static assets from gui/ so teams can standardize packaging without forcing a framework migration first.
No root HTML surface was detected, so this shell becomes the first consistent GUI baseline for the repository.
